Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9001 0 0}I'll be joining you guys from here on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, I'm a former member, so I'm just gonna do my own thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9010 0 0}Looks like we'll be working together for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, I'm gonna take a backseat for today... I'll be ready tomorrow, so hit me up anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}The full moon is tomorrow, isn't it? Shouldn't you be preparing for that instead of wandering around?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if you want to go to Tartarus tonight, I'll join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9101 0 0}Can't believe he got played like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9043 0 0}Hmph, I ain't actually pissed or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm just saying he shouldn't put up with that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9055 0 0}...What's done is done. Anyway, you better be careful too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}How long is Junpei going to keep this up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmph... You should keep a lookout for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9002 0 0}...I was just thinking about asking you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is that Chidori girl still in the hospital?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tch... Just hope he doesn't get in trouble...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I heard Junpei's in charge of finding out more about that Chidori girl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is he really our best shot...? Well, better than Kirijo or Aki, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Bother someone else if you're bored. I got nothing to offer you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether or not I fit into your battle plan is up to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can remove me from the party whenever you think that's for the better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9068 0 0}So, a large Shadow will appear during the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}And you've already beat nine of 'em, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not bad. Let's just hope we can keep this streak up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9056 0 0}The culture festival... I forgot we did that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}That crap doesn't interest me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9056 0 0}The culture festival... I forgot we did that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hate that stuff. I try not to think about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tch, why can't he act like a normal kid...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9061 0 0}Looks like you're feeling better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, take it easy today. Who do you think has to deal with you collapsing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9102 0 0}Tartarus and the Dark Hour are still dragging on, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Dammit... Why won't they just disappear...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then go bother the chairman or something. He'd love a captive audience for his terrible puns.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you wanna kill some time, go find Junpei or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I only take orders in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not only are we fightin' Shadows, now we gotta deal with Strega, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You better train up while you can. It'll be too late for regrets later on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You might think you have this down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}But don't drop your guard 'til the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9113 0 0}Hmph, Mr. Chairman sure is carefree...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I told him not to overestimate my ability. Don't rely on me too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Got nerves of steel, even though it's almost the full moon?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9112 0 0}Hmph, you're just like a certain musclebound moron...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess you really are a natural at this sorta lifestyle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, we just gotta beat three more Shadows and we're in the clear. Just hang on 'til then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}'Bout time those Shadows got a fire under their asses. Make sure you're prepared.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll... do what I gotta do, too.[n]{f 1 1}
